description: Operate self-hosted OpenClaw and Hermes agent fleets on Docker or Kubernetes from MCP clients.
name: io.github.solomon2773/nora

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your Nora backend API (e.g. https://nora.example.com). Falls back to NORA_HOST, then the Nora CLI config at ~/.nora/config.json.
environmentVariables.name: NORA_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Nora workspace API key (nora_…) used to authenticate against the Nora public REST API. Falls back to NORA_TOKEN, then the Nora CLI config.
environmentVariables.name: NORA_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Set to "true" to enable destructive tools (e.g. delete_agent). Disabled by default.
environmentVariables.name: NORA_MCP_ALLOW_DESTRUCTIVE

title: Nora
